description_long: This is a large, modern sectional sofa with a U-shaped configuration, upholstered in a deep blue fabric. The sofa features multiple seat and back cushions, all of which appear to be uniform in size and thickness, providing a plush and inviting seating area. The armrests are present on both ends, straight and at the same height as the backrest, giving the piece a clean, contemporary silhouette. The sofa is elevated on slender, dark-colored legs, which are positioned at the corners and along the base for support. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, contributing to a minimalist aesthetic. This piece is designed to comfortably accommodate several people and would be suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or neighborhood gathering spaces.
description: A large, U-shaped sectional sofa in deep blue fabric with straight armrests, uniform cushions, and slender dark legs. Its modern, minimalist design is both inviting and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full U-shaped layout, all seat and back cushions, and both armrests clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the straight armrest, and the arrangement of the seat cushions along the length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the alignment of the sofa's legs along the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other armrest, the sectional extension, and the uniformity of the cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Seven uniform, rectangular seat cushions and seven matching back cushions, all attached and arranged in a continuous sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, rectangular armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with no visible decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Eight slender, dark-colored legs positioned at the corners and along the base, with a simple, exposed, and slightly tapered metal design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with attached, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid deep blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
